title: Bengely
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Bengely |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector]] |system=[[Bengely system/Legends|Bengely system]] |coordinates=N-19 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Not like the old days in the Outer Rim.''"
"''Lucky for you it isn't. On Tatooine or Bengely there'd have been fifteen blasters on you before you got your second shot off.|[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|''[[Vision of the Future]]''}} '''Bengely''' was a seedy [[Planet/Legends|world]] with an underworld that had a dangerous reputation. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Tamarin sector locations]]
